FR-001.title: Active tab shows only the accent underline on click; visible focus ring on keyboard focus only

FR-002.title: Coverage donut renders once (hero chip); Coverage heading carries no count

FR-003.title: Proof/Notes badges are warning-tinted attention counts (uncovered/concerns) or absent; Decisions/Work keep counts

FR-004.title: Checks render as content-width wrapping pills under the heading Checks — no grid holes

FR-005.title: Section headings Title Case at readable size; uppercase stays only on inline metadata prefixes

FR-006.title: Coverage rows drop the list bullet; the FR chip is the marker

FR-007.title: Metadata label color derives from theme foreground via color-mix

FR-008.title: Viewer header renders the spec name in Title Case

FR-009.title: Stories cover new badge states + pill layout; tab-model logic unit-tested

FR-010.title: Token-driven, theme-safe styling; no capture or schema changes

context: area: webview/src/spec-viewer/components (ActivityTabs, VerifiedCard, CoverageCard, PlanSection) + webview/styles/spec-viewer/_activity.css
constraint: taste findings from issue #405 screenshot review; impeccable source pass already clean
constraint: no capture/schema changes; hero status + header badge pairing stays
intent: Make the Activity panel read as designed: one deliberate focus treatment, each number once, checks as pills, headings with hierarchy
expectations: hero status + viewer header badge pairing stays (page chrome vs panel summary)
